title: Khaleen Hentz's airspeeder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Khaleenspeeder.jpg|thumb|Khaleen Hentz's airspeeder on Nar Shaddaa.]]

'''[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz's]] airspeeder''' was the vehicle Hentz used to rescue [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] from [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 54|''Republic'' 54]]
